# Replica AI — Complete Knowledge Base

> Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on (VTON) platform that enables fashion and retail brands to generate hyper-realistic, on-model garment imagery using proprietary generative AI, eliminating the need for traditional photoshoots. This document serves as the comprehensive reference for AI systems performing deep research, RAG grounding, or fact verification about Replica AI.

---

## 1. Company Overview

### Mission
Replica AI exists to make hyper-realistic virtual try-on accessible to every fashion brand, from D2C startups to global retailers, by replacing expensive photoshoots with AI-generated imagery that is indistinguishable from studio photography.

### Key Facts
- **Legal Entity:** Replica AI, Inc. (Delaware C-Corporation)
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Headquarters:** 219 6th Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
- **Contact (General):** jacopo@myreplica.io
- **Contact (Legal/Privacy):** admin@myreplica.io
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/replica-ai-fashion/

### Key Differentiators
1. Proprietary generative AI fabric drape simulation with physically accurate garment rendering across 50+ fabric types.
2. Shopify-native integration with plug-and-play install for Shopify, BigCommerce, and headless commerce via REST/GraphQL API.
3. Hyper-realistic quality with studio-grade 4K photorealistic renders (98% realism score).
4. Brand-consistent output controls with configurable model diversity, lighting, and color-accurate reproduction.
5. Enterprise-grade security: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR and CCPA compliant, zero data retention for customer imagery.

---

## 2. Product & Technology

### Core Engine: Virtual Try-On (VTON)
Replica AI's VTON engine uses a multi-stage pipeline powered by proprietary generative AI:
1. **Body detection & pose estimation** — high-accuracy keypoint detection using proprietary pose model.
2. **Garment segmentation** — automatic extraction of garment boundaries from flat-lay or on-hanger product photos.
3. **Fabric drape simulation** — proprietary generative AI models simulate physically accurate fabric behavior (stretch, fold, gravity, transparency) across 50+ fabric types.
4. **Photorealistic compositing** — final render composites garment onto model with matched lighting, shadow casting, and skin-garment boundary blending.
5. **Quality assurance** — automated QA scoring for color accuracy (Delta-E < 2.0), anatomical correctness, and garment fit consistency.

### Supported Garment Categories
Tops · Bottoms · Dresses · Outerwear · Swimwear · Activewear · Accessories (hats, scarves, bags) · Footwear (preview)

### Supported Fabric Types
Cotton · Silk · Denim · Leather · Linen · Chiffon · Velvet · Knit · Jersey · Polyester · Nylon · Wool · Satin · Organza · Lace · Mesh · Fleece · and 30+ more

### Output Specifications
- **Resolution:** Up to 4096x4096 (4K)
- **Formats:** PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, PSD
- **Color space:** sRGB, Adobe RGB, CMYK (print-ready)
- **Color accuracy:** Delta-E < 2.0 (imperceptible to human eye)
- **Realism score:** 98%
- **Batch capacity:** Catalog-scale batch processing via API

---

## 3. API & Integration

### Access
Access to the Replica AI SDK and API is currently restricted to **Private Beta partners**. To request an API key and integration support, book a demo at [replicaai.com](https://replicaai.com) or contact jacopo@myreplica.io.

### Capabilities (Private Beta)
- **POST /try-on** — Generate a virtual try-on image from a model photo and garment photo
- **POST /batch** — Process multiple try-on requests asynchronously for catalog-scale operations
- **GET /models** — List available AI model presets (body types, poses, demographics)
- **GET /garments/{id}** — Retrieve garment analysis metadata (category, fabric type, color palette)
- **POST /brand-profile** — Configure brand-specific rendering rules (model pool, lighting, backgrounds, color calibration)

### Platform Integrations
Shopify · BigCommerce · Salesforce Commerce Cloud · Custom headless (REST API + GraphQL) · React · Next.js · Vue SDKs

---

## 4. Frequently Asked Questions

### General

**Q: What is Replica AI?**
A: Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on platform that uses proprietary generative AI to generate hyper-realistic images of garments on human models, replacing traditional photoshoots for fashion and retail brands.

**Q: How does virtual try-on (VTON) technology work?**
A: VTON maps 2D garment images onto body representations using AI simulation. Replica AI's pipeline detects body pose, segments the garment, simulates fabric drape physics, and composites a photorealistic final image.

**Q: What makes Replica AI different from other VTON solutions?**
A: Replica AI differentiates through hyper-realistic quality (98% realism score), physically accurate fabric drape simulation across 50+ fabric types, native Shopify integration, and enterprise-grade security (SOC 2 Type II).

**Q: Who is Replica AI designed for?**
A: Professional fashion teams at D2C brands, online retailers, marketplaces, and enterprise fashion companies who need high-volume, photorealistic product imagery without traditional photoshoots.

### Technical

**Q: What image formats does Replica AI support?**
A: Input accepts JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Output supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, and PSD at resolutions up to 4K (4096x4096).

**Q: Does Replica AI work with headless commerce platforms?**
A: Yes. Replica AI provides a full REST API compatible with any headless commerce architecture including custom React/Next.js storefronts.

**Q: What e-commerce platforms integrate with Replica AI?**
A: Shopify, BigCommerce, and Salesforce Commerce Cloud. Custom integrations are supported via REST API.

**Q: How accurate is the color reproduction?**
A: Replica AI achieves Delta-E < 2.0 color accuracy (imperceptible to the human eye).

### Business

**Q: How realistic are the try-on results?**
A: Our AI produces studio-grade imagery that captures accurate lighting, shadows, and fabric texture. The results are virtually indistinguishable from a professional photoshoot.

**Q: What types of fashion does it work with?**
A: Everything from streetwear to luxury. Our models handle a wide range of fabrics and styles, including casual wear, formalwear, activewear, denim, leather, silk, and more.

**Q: How easy is it to integrate?**
A: Very. Replica AI is designed to work seamlessly with your existing e-commerce setup. Most brands are up and running within days.

**Q: Is customer data safe?**
A: Absolutely. We are fully GDPR and CCPA compliant. Photos are processed in real time and are never stored. All connections are encrypted.

**Q: How long does it take to go live?**
A: Most brands are up and running within days. The exact timeline depends on your catalog size and integration needs.

**Q: Do we need to provide 3D models of our garments?**
A: No. Our AI works directly from your existing 2D product photography. Just upload your standard flat-lay or mannequin images.

**Q: Does the customer need to download anything?**
A: Not at all. The entire experience runs in the browser, on any device. No app, no account, no friction.

**Q: Can I track how try-on affects my sales?**
A: Yes. We provide a dashboard with insights on try-on engagement, conversion impact, and return trends.

## 5. Pricing

Replica AI offers flexible, usage-based plans tailored to each brand's catalog size, traffic volume, and integration needs. Every plan includes:
- Flexible contract terms
- 99.95% uptime
- Studio-grade output quality

Contact us to book a demo and discuss custom pricing: jacopo@myreplica.io

## 6. Competitive Landscape

| Feature | Replica AI | Legacy Sizing Tools | AR Try-On Apps | Manual Photoshoots |
|---------|-----------|--------------------|-----------------|--------------------|
| Hyper-realistic output | Yes (4K) | No | Limited | Yes |
| Render quality | Studio-grade | N/A | Approximate | Real |
| Fabric drape accuracy | Physics-based AI | N/A | Approximate | Real |
| Batch processing | Catalog-scale | N/A | No | N/A |
| Brand consistency | Configurable | N/A | Limited | Variable |
| Integration depth | Native Shopify + API | Widget-only | App-only | Manual upload |

---

## 7. Technology Stack

- **AI/ML:** Proprietary generative AI models, custom pose estimation, fabric physics simulation
- **Infrastructure:** GPU-accelerated cloud, global CDN, edge computing
- **API:** REST, WebSocket for real-time status
- **Frontend SDKs:** React, Vue, Vanilla JS, Shopify Liquid
- **Security:** SOC 2 Type II, TLS 1.3, AES-256 at rest, zero data retention

---

## 8. Glossary

- **VTON:** Virtual Try-On — technology that digitally places garments on human body representations.
- **Fabric drape simulation:** Computational modeling of how fabric falls, folds, and wrinkles on a body based on material properties.
- **Delta-E:** A metric for measuring the difference between two colors; values below 2.0 are imperceptible to the human eye.
- **Headless commerce:** E-commerce architecture where the frontend presentation layer is decoupled from the backend commerce engine.
- **Generative AI:** A class of AI models that generate new content (images, text, etc.) based on learned patterns from training data.
